human_hints.title: E-Piano
human_hints.summary: One chord in mid intensity piano every 1 bar, plus a soft arpeggiato by 0.5 bar each up and down the triad of the main chord

human_hints.title: indistinct chat
human_hints.summary: There are male and female voices chatting.

human_hints.title: Female vocal
human_hints.summary: Phrases are soft, spiritual, calm. each phrase repeats 'what a feeling' for about 2 bars each.

human_hints.title: Female voca ends slowly
human_hints.summary: This space leaves one bar with the instrumental base.

human_hints.title: Female Vocal + Indistinct chatter
human_hints.summary: Female vocal overlaps the indistinct chat in the background. This time, a soft ride is added to build a bit of groove.

human_hints.title: Snares only
human_hints.summary: only the snare ride continue while the music reverb fades out.

human_hints.title: Soft Female Vocal + indistinct chatter
human_hints.summary: Soft transition from intimate indistinct chatter, while the female vocal starts rising.

human_hints.title: Female vocal + arpegiatto
human_hints.summary:
complete harmony with drums, long female vocal phrases. Arpegiatto runs at one beat per chord, with sevenths and fours.
This phrase repeats.

complete harmony with drums, long female vocal phrases. Arpegiatto runs at one beat per chord, with sevenths and fours.
similar to the previous phrase.

human_hints.title: Instrumental
human_hints.summary: e-piano as bass, snares and machine kicks, a synthesizer plays longs easy notes.

human_hints.title: outro
human_hints.summary: similar to the intro. E-piano as bass, with a one beat arpeggiato on the same chord.
